title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Retry
scenario: Fit Test retry after cancel or failure on screen 2 does not restart the test and display results on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device that supports Fit Test already connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. Tap "Start Test" to begin the fit test.
4. On the second screen of the fit test, either tap "Cancel" or intentionally fail the test.
5. Tap "Retry" to attempt the fit test again.
expected: The fit test is performed again and the result is displayed.
